questions.question: Explain the difference between CBOW and Skip-Gram architectures in Word2Vec.
expectedPoints: CBOW predicts target word from context words
Skip-Gram predicts context words from target word
CBOW is faster and works better with frequent words
Skip-Gram performs better with larger datasets and rare words

questions.question: Describe the training process of Word2Vec with negative sampling, including its advantages over the full softmax approach.
expectedPoints: Original softmax is computationally expensive O(V)
Negative sampling approximates softmax by sampling negative examples
Only updates weights for positive and few negative samples
Reduces computation from O(V) to O(k) where k is number of negatives
